race.comment: The well-related EDGE OF INFINITY (9) (half to G2 winner and 2xG1 placed Osipenko) resumes here but showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration for a race like this. Can feature while fresh. VIDEO VIXEN (8) has been knocking on the door throughout this prep and finds another good chance to finally get off the mark. Draws low and gets in well with the claim. Taking seriously. FLYING AKEED (12) couldn't live up to market expectation first-up on the Gold Coast poly but was warming late. Better for that and can improve sharply. MYSTICAL GEM (6) returns and makes her stable debut for the Chau camp. Was good in her only run last campaign when beaten narrowly at Pakenham. Has trialled well in readiness and can make a bright start in the new colours.
